data.body:
Sensei!
CM Arcie's next live stream (2nd Anniversary Special) is coming this Friday!
There's also an EXCLUSIVE video to be released, so be sure to tune in!

🗓️Date & Time: 11/3 (Fri) 0:00 AM (UTC)
➡️YouTube Link: https://youtube.com/live/Q-35UJATlsM
